race.comment: UNAPPROACHABLE (9) scored last start at this track to make it two wins from four starts this campaign. Going too well to ignore. NASRAAWY (2) broke a bit of a drought last time in and while that was a much easier race than this, confidence will be high and he'll give himself every chance on-speed. MRS ARCHIBALD (5) was out of the money when resuming two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1000m at Caulfield Heath, beaten 5.5 lengths into 11th. Has started three times at this course and distance and is yet to miss the placings. GINA'S A STAR (14) trialled brilliantly coming into the preparation and after not being disgraced first-up, bounced back to win nicely when dropping back to 1000m. Back up in trip here, but nice draw presents every chance to run it right out.
